items.title: Air Force Contract, Arms Executive Order Spark Bullish Move For Boeing, Defense Stocks
items.description: Boeing, Curtiss-Wright rise on Air Force modernization contract. President Trump reveals foreign military sales executive order.

items.title: Can the Aerospace and Defense Rally Continue in 2026?
items.description: We discuss the outlook for the sector following a strong rally.

items.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: Traders bought up tech shares Monday, lifting the S&P 500 for back-to-back gains. The Dow Industrials also hit fresh intraday and closing records.

items.title: The Most Out-Of-The-World ETF Yet: Tuttle's Latest Fund Is Built Around Possible Alien Tech
items.description: A new ETF, Tuttle Capital UFO Disclosure ETF (BATS: UFOD), bets on companies that could profit from government disclosure of non-human intelligence. It focuses on defense and industrial firms.

items.title: Curtiss-Wright Stock Rises On $400M Boeing Deal To Upgrade Air Force C-17 Fleet
items.description: Curtiss-Wright Corporation (CW) traded higher on Monday after announcing a defense contract win with The Boeing Company (BA) to supply mission computer technology for the U.S. Air Force's C-17 Globemaster III fleet modernization program.
